flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Point Loma Nazarene University rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.6k → $15.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Point Loma Nazarene University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.5k → $46.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Point Loma Nazarene University rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($23.7k → $27.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Point Loma Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).
